HBP New Inclusion Request Am I Eligible Find Hospital Grievance Portal National Health Authority would like to inform that www.pmjay.gov.in is the only official website of Ayushman Bharat – Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB PM-JAY). We request the public not to pay heed to fraudulent web portals, e-mails, calls, SMS and WhatsApp messages regarding the vacancies, enrolment/premium payments etc. related to the scheme. Issued in public interest by National Health Authority. Latest News HOSPITAL ADMISSIONS HOSPITAL ADMISSIONS 10,40,33,937 Progress since launch *As of 21 st September, 2025 20,232 Progress in last 24 hours *As of 21 st September, 2025 at 11.59 P.M. Ayushman Cards ISSUED* Ayushman Cards ISSUED* 42,17,58,675 Progress since launch *As of 21 st September, 2025 70,256 Progress in last 24 hours *As of 21 st September, 2025 at 11.59 P.M. What's New The Consultation with States and UTs on #AyushmanBharat #PMJAY concluded successfully on 31st July 2025 at Vigyan Bhawan, New Delhi. The event featured insightful discussions, the exchange of best practices, and a shared vision for PM-JAY 2.0. Published Date: 5-08-2025 Circular for engagement of retired PPs/ PS as Consultants in NHA Published Date: 14-05-2025 केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्री श्री जगत प्रकाश नड्डा और ओडिशा के मुख्यमंत्री श्री मोहन चरण माझी ने ओडिशा के लाभार्थियों को AB PM-JAY और GJAY के कोब्रांडेड कार्ड शुभारंभ और वितरित किए Published Date: 11-04-2025 Union Health Minister Shri Jagat Prakash Nadda and Odisha CM Shri Mohan Charan Majhi launch and distribute Cobranded cards of AB PM-JAY & GJAY to beneficiaries of Odisha Published Date: 11-04-2025 View all PM-JAY In News केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्री श्री जगत प्रकाश नड्डा और ओडिशा के मुख्यमंत्री श्री मोहन चरण माझी ने ओडिशा… Published Date: 11-04-2025 और पढ़े Union Health Minister Shri Jagat Prakash Nadda and Odisha CM Shri Mohan Charan Majhi launch and… Published Date: 11-04-2025 Read more राष्ट्रीय राजधानी क्षेत्र दिल्ली के लाभार्थियों को एबी पीएम-जेएवाई के आयुष्मान कार्ड का वितरण Published Date: 11-04-2025 और पढ़े Ayushman cards of AB PM-JAY distributed to beneficiaries of NCT of Delhi Published Date: 11-04-2025 Read more View all Events NHA organised National Level Workshop on AB PM-JAY at Vigyan Bhawan, New Delhi on Jan 17, 2025 Ayushman Sangam (North Eastern Region) - NHA organized a two-day regional review meeting for eight north eastern states for PMJAY on 16th and 17th March 2023. NHA organised a two-day comprehensive training workshop for railways hospitals for providing quality healthcare to PM-JAY Beneficiaries. Global Conference on Digital Health - NHA was directed by the Ministry to set-up stall for PM-JAY and participate as a speaker at the Gloabl Conference on Digital Health being organized by WHO in New Delhi on 20th and 21st March 2023. Inauguration of Arogya Manthan 2022 by Shri. Mansukh Mandaviya Ji, Hon’ble Union Minister for Health & Family Welfare on 23rd September 2022. View all Photo Gallerys 70+

Minister for Health and Social Affairs, Sweden Having visited AIIMS & other healthcare facilities I would like to appreciate the efforts of the staff that works towards making the scheme available to all. It takes years of effort & political commitment to achieve Universal Health Coverage Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus Director General, World Health Organization I would like to recognize the efforts of India's government. to provide healthcare to those who can't afford it. Health is not for me or you, it is for all. Prof Abhijit Banerjee Nobel Prize Awardee and Co-Founder, Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab The fact that this technology ‘Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY’ is now working is already a major milestone Dr. Christopher Elias President, Global Development Division, Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation The innovative response against the pandemic and incorporating it into the scheme is an excellent choice Dr. V Anandlakshmi Nodal Officer, Indira Gandhi Government General Hospital From being as an anesthetist for 25 years to an administrator of the world largest flagship programme introduced by the Government of India, I feel like I’ve come a long way and I feel proud to be part of this wonderfully beneficial scheme Lalwamsanga Aizawl, Mizoram AB PM-JAY is a blessing and if it wasn’t there my future would have look very different VandeMataram Read more about VandeMataram Re-advertisement for the posts of DD and AD (Fin) Submitted by on 6 March 2024 Read more about Re-advertisement for the posts of DD and AD (Fin) INTERNSHIP GUIDELINES OF THE NATIONAL HEALTH AUTHORITY Submitted by on 29 February 2024 Read more about INTERNSHIP GUIDELINES OF THE NATIONAL HEALTH AUTHORITY TH: केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्री श्री जगत प्रकाश नड्डा और ओडिशा के मुख्यमंत्री श्री मोहन चरण माझी ने ओडिशा के लाभार्थियों को AB PM-JAY और GJAY के कोब्रांडेड कार्ड शुभारंभ और वितरित किए Submitted by

Presentations NHM Guidelines Rural Health Statistics (RHS) 12th Five Year Plan & HLEG OM & Orders India COVID-19 ER&HSP Package COVID-19 EPC/MSG/CRM Health Systems Strengthening+ State Annual Plan+ NCD NHM Finance - FMG Innovation Summit+ RMNCH+A+ NUHM Orders/letters Media Newsletters Photo Gallery Video Gallery Archives Contact Us Web Information Manager MoHFW Officials List States/UTs Official VISION The National Health Policy, 2017 envisages- "the attainment of the highest possible level of health and wellbeing for all at all ages, through a preventive and promotive health care orientation in all developmental policies, and universal access to good quality health care services without anyone having to face financial hardship as a consequence". The aim of NHM is to ensure progress towards the goals and targets set out in the National Health Policy, 2017 for ensuring "universal access to equitable, affordable and quality health care services, accountable and responsive to people's needs". This would also enable the country to advance towards meeting Sustainable Development Goal3, i.e. "Ensure healthy lives and promote well-being for all at all ages", including Universal Health Coverage. Search Our search engine will find the relevant schemes ! Select & Apply Select and apply for the best suited scheme About myScheme is a National Platform that aims to offer one-stop search and discovery of the Government schemes. It provides an innovative, technology-based solution to discover scheme information based upon the eligibility of the citizen. The platform helps the citizen to find the right Government schemes for them. It also guides on how to apply for different Government schemes. Thus no need to visit multiple Government websites. View More Frequently Asked Questions Checkout our knowledge base for some of your answers! What is myScheme? myScheme is an e-Marketplace for Govt. schemes and services. Using myScheme you can find various government schemes, check your eligibility, and apply for the schemes. How myScheme will help common citizens? myScheme will reduce the time and effort of citizens in searching for appropriate government schemes.The easy user interface of myScheme helps common people a lot in discovering and applying for schemes. Can I apply for the schemes through myScheme? For now, the platform shall direct you to the application page of the scheme of your choice.It is envisaged that in the upcoming phases, myScheme shall have the feature to apply for schemes / services from within the platform/ app. How does myScheme work? How do I check for my eligibility through myScheme ? myScheme offers a convenient three - step process for the citizens to discover the government schemes for which they are eligible: Step 1 - The user enters his / her attributes such as demographic, income, social details, etc. Step 2 - The myScheme finds the relevant schemes from hundreds of schemes for the user. Step 3 - The user can select from the list of eligible schemes and get more information from the dedicated scheme page with detailed knowledge, FAQs, and application process and traverse to the application URL to apply. What all information about a particular scheme can I find on myScheme ? myScheme provides details on the eligibility criteria, application process, and benefits being offered under that scheme. myScheme also answers the Frequently Asked Questions(FAQs) about the scheme.
